# Muhammad Taha (BoltTaha)

> Muhammad Taha, also known as BoltTaha, is a Forward Deployed Software
> Engineer based in Pakistan who partners with businesses to turn broken,
> time-consuming workflows into automated software systems — spanning
> computer vision, LLM infrastructure, backend systems, and data pipelines.
> He is a BS Computer Science student at FAST-NUCES (Class of 2027) and
> Co-Lead of the AWS Cloud Club, FAST-NUCES Peshawar.

## Pages

- [Home](https://muhammadtaha.app/): overview, selected work, experience, stack, track record, client testimonials
- [About](https://muhammadtaha.app/about): background, working approach, education, certifications
- [Contact](https://muhammadtaha.app/contact): contact form and direct links

## Production work for named clients

- Basketball Highlight Detection — two-stage computer vision pipeline for a sports analytics client
- GTM Sales Intelligence Assistant — hybrid text-to-SQL engine for Gohar Textile Mills
- Automated Extraction Engine — PDF purchase-order-to-Excel automation for Gohar Textile Mills
- GTM Sales Forecasting Engine — statistical sales forecasting pipeline for Gohar Textile Mills
- OCR Preprocessing Pipeline — production document-cleaning pipeline for a US legal records company, processing an estimated 20M+ scanned documents

## Core skills

Python, PyTorch, computer vision (YOLO, OpenCV, object detection & tracking),
LangChain, Retrieval Augmented Generation, AI agent development, Model
Context Protocol (MCP), large language models, AWS Bedrock, Google Gemini
API, FastAPI, Next.js, React, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, data engineering, XGBoost
and time-series forecasting, OCR, Docker, AWS, Microsoft Azure, Hadoop &
Spark.

## Certifications

Claude Code (Anthropic), Model Context Protocol (Anthropic), AI Fluency
(Anthropic), Google Cybersecurity (Google/Coursera).
